title: equisetaceae
intro: Equisetaceae is a family of vascular plants that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. This taxonomical rank is a classification group that consists of a group of related genera. It includes species such as horsetails, which are known for their unique, hollow, and jointed stems. The Equisetaceae family is characterized by its distinctive and primitive characteristics, often dating back to the ancient times of the Earth's flora.
